instruction: Move the gripper 10cm above the object which is far away from your current position and are using to drink coffee.
code:
```python

pri.move(target_pos, white_quat)```

instruction: please grab the block which is the cloest to the red block
code:
```python
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
blue_pos, blue_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('blue_block')
green_pos, green_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('green_block')
yellow_pos, yellow_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('yellow_block')
distances={'blue_block':np.linalg.norm(red_pos-blue_pos),'green_block':np.linalg.norm(red_pos-green_pos),'yellow_block':np.linalg.norm(red_pos-yellow_pos)}
sorted_distances = sorted(distances.items(), key=lambda item:item[1])
cloest_obj = sorted_distances[0][0]
pri.grab(cloest_obj)
pri.reset_robot()```

instruction: pick up the block that is the cloest to the yellow block
code:
```python
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
blue_pos, blue_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('blue_block')
green_pos, green_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('green_block')
yellow_pos, yellow_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('yellow_block')
distances={'blue_block':np.linalg.norm(yellow_pos-blue_pos),'green_block':np.linalg.norm(yellow_pos-green_pos),'red_block':np.linalg.norm(yellow_pos-red_pos)}
sorted_distances = sorted(distances.items(), key=lambda item:item[1])
cloest_obj = sorted_distances[0][0]
pri.grab(cloest_obj)
pri.reset_robot()```

instruction: pick up the cube that is the farthest from the blue block
code:
```python
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
blue_pos, blue_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('blue_block')
green_pos, green_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('green_block')
yellow_pos, yellow_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('yellow_block')
distances={'red_block':np.linalg.norm(blue_pos-red_pos),'green_block':np.linalg.norm(blue_pos-green_pos),'yellow_block':np.linalg.norm(blue_pos-yellow_pos)}
sorted_distances = sorted(distances.items(), key=lambda item:item[1])
farthest_obj = sorted_distances[-1][0]
pri.grab(farthest_obj)
pri.reset_robot()```

instruction: grab the cube that is the second farthest from the green cube
code:
```python
red_pos, red_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('red_block')
blue_pos, blue_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('blue_block')
green_pos, green_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('green_block')
yellow_pos, yellow_quat = pri.get_obj_pose('yellow_block')
distances={'red_block':np.linalg.norm(green_pos-red_pos),'blue_block':np.linalg.norm(green_pos-blue_pos),'yellow_block':np.linalg.norm(green_pos-yellow_pos)}
sorted_distances = sorted(distances.items(), key=lambda item:item[1])
second_farthest_obj = sorted_distances[-2][0]
pri.grab(second_farthest_obj)
pri.reset_robot()```
